name: Taco Salad with Cumin Dressing
recipeInstructions:
1. Toast the tortillas on a baking sheet in a 400°F oven for about 10 minutes. While hot, sprinkle with Parmesan cheese. Cool and break into bite-size pieces.
2. Chop the lettuce and arrange it at the bottom of a salad bowl.
3. Make the cumin dressing by combining salt, vinegar, pepper, garlic powder, lemon juice, mustard, cumin, water, and vegetable oil in a bowl or jar.
4. Heat the turkey with cumin seeds in a skillet.
5. Sprinkle chunks of turkey over the lettuce. Add tomato pieces and cheese.
6. Pour on the cumin dressing and top with tortilla chips.
